compatibleScales.musicalContext: All genres. Used for chromatic passing tones, approach notes, and connecting scale tones. Essential for jazz, bebop, and advanced improvisation
compatibleScales.musicGenreRecommendations: All genres, Jazz, Bebop, Classical, Contemporary, Fusion, Avant-Garde
compatibleScales.recommendedUse: Use for chromatic passing tones between any scale tones. Essential for bebop lines, voice leading, and creating tension

compatibleScales.relationship: Bebop scales use chromatic passing tones
compatibleScales.rationale: Bebop scales are diatonic scales with added chromatic passing tones. Chromatic scale provides the source for these additions
compatibleScales.musicalContext: Bebop, jazz, swing. Chromatic tones create strong eighth-note bebop lines and authentic jazz phrasing
compatibleScales.musicGenreRecommendations: Bebop, Jazz, Swing, Hard Bop, Straight-Ahead Jazz
compatibleScales.recommendedUse: Add chromatic passing tones to create bebop scales. Essential for authentic bebop phrasing and voice leading

compatibleScales.relationship: Chromatic approach from above or below target notes
compatibleScales.rationale: Chromatic scale provides half-step approach notes to any target. Essential technique for jazz and bebop improvisation
compatibleScales.musicalContext: Jazz, bebop, fusion. Creates tension and resolution using chromatic approach notes. Essential for modern jazz phrasing
compatibleScales.musicGenreRecommendations: Jazz, Bebop, Fusion, Contemporary Jazz, Modern Jazz
compatibleScales.recommendedUse: Use chromatic tones as approach notes (half-step above or below) to target chord tones. Essential jazz technique

compatibleScales.relationship: Whole tone contains augmented triad plus additional tones
compatibleScales.rationale: E augmented triad (E-G#-C) is embedded in E whole tone scale. Whole tone provides full augmented context
compatibleScales.musicalContext: Jazz, impressionist, film scores. Whole tone expands augmented harmony with complete symmetrical scale
compatibleScales.musicGenreRecommendations: Jazz, Impressionist, Film Scores, Avant-Garde, Contemporary, Fusion
compatibleScales.recommendedUse: Use whole tone over augmented chords for full symmetrical augmented sound. Creates floating, dreamlike quality

compatibleScales.relationship: Major scale with augmented 5th
compatibleScales.rationale: E augmented triad forms the core of Lydian Augmented. Adds major scale structure to augmented harmony
compatibleScales.musicalContext: Jazz, fusion, contemporary. Provides tonal center to augmented sound. More structured than whole tone
compatibleScales.musicGenreRecommendations: Jazz, Fusion, Contemporary, Avant-Garde, Film Scores
compatibleScales.recommendedUse: Use over Emaj7#5#11 for augmented major sound with tonal center. More melodic than whole tone

compatibleScales.relationship: Harmonic minor-derived augmented major
compatibleScales.rationale: E augmented triad forms the core. Provides augmented major sound from harmonic minor system
compatibleScales.musicalContext: Jazz, neoclassical, contemporary. Augmented major from harmonic minor context
compatibleScales.musicGenreRecommendations: Jazz, Neoclassical, Contemporary, Film Scores, Fusion
compatibleScales.recommendedUse: Use over Eaug or Emaj7♯5 for exotic augmented major. From harmonic minor family

compatibleScales.relationship: Same augmented triad, different root
compatibleScales.rationale: Only four distinct augmented triads exist. E, G#, and C augmented are the same triad. Symmetrical relationship
compatibleScales.musicalContext: All genres using augmented harmony. Essential for understanding augmented symmetry
compatibleScales.musicGenreRecommendations: All genres, Jazz, Classical, Contemporary, Fusion
compatibleScales.recommendedUse: Use interchangeably. Any of the three roots work over any augmented chord built from these notes

compatibleScales.relationship: Same augmented triad, different root
compatibleScales.rationale: E, G#, and C augmented are identical. Understanding this symmetry is essential for augmented harmony
compatibleScales.musicalContext: All genres using augmented harmony. Creates smooth modulation between augmented chords
compatibleScales.musicGenreRecommendations: All genres, Jazz, Classical, Contemporary, Fusion
compatibleScales.recommendedUse: Use any root over E, G#, or C augmented chords. Essential for augmented harmony and modulation
